reach_why: Extends familiar skepticism about novelty, priors, and underdetermination; unlikely to open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links contaminated novelty, benchmark inheritance, and alien-fact stress tests into one epistemic critique.
falsifiable_why: Mostly conceptual; only weakly testable through comparative prediction of hidden-source contamination and prior-driven assimilation.
explanation: Apparent discovery may just repackage inherited human concepts, especially when priors favor familiar explanations.
